title: Cremlevian War

{{Quote|Some have interpreted the ancient texts to imply that we were… banished… for our infatuation with war and conquest.|[[Harrar]], Yuuzhan Vong [[Priest caste|priest]]|<ref name="tuf" />}}
The '''Cremlevian War''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] intra–[[Species/Legends|species]] war. Fought between a [[Domain Yo'gand|domain]] led by [[Warmaster]] [[Yo'gand]] and another [[Domain Steng|domain]] led by Warmaster [[Steng]], the war saw the destruction of much of the Yuuzhan Vong's [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|home galaxy]]. Yo'gand's [[domain]] eventually proved victorious after the [[Battle of Ygziir]] around [[15,000 BBY/Legends|15,000 BBY]]. However, the war left the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] in ruins, and the warlike Yuuzhan Vong were [[Sever Force/Legends|stripped]] of the ability to use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Sentience/Legends|living]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yuuzhan'tar]]. The Yuuzhan Vong eventually abandoned their damaged galaxy, searching the [[Intergalactic Void]] for a new home.

==History==
{{Quote|The ancient texts are unclear. It appears we were invaded by a race that was more technological than animate. We called on the gods for protection, and they came to our aid, providing us with the knowledge we needed to convert our living resources to weapons. We defeated the threat, and, empowered by our victory, we gradually became conquerors of other species and civilizations.|Harrar|<ref name="tuf" />}}
[[File:YuuzhantarNEGAS.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The Yuuzhan Vong homeworld, [[Yuuzhan'tar]]]]
The Cremlevian War began in the wake of an [[Silentium–Abominor War|invasion]] by a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] in the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]'s [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|galaxy]]. Threatened by extinction, the Yuuzhan Vong developed new weapons and [[Biot|technology]], eventually defeating their droid enemies. After this victory, the Yuuzhan Vong continued waging war on other species in the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], conquering a number of [[Planet/Legends|worlds]]. However, the species also began warring amongst itself.<ref name="tuf" /><ref name="cswe" /><ref name="njo">''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]''</ref>

At some point, the two most powerful tribes—[[Domain Yo'gand|one]] led by [[Warmaster]] [[Yo'gand]] and [[Domain Steng|another]] led by Warmaster [[Steng]]—clashed. The resulting conflict known as the Cremlevian War saw the destruction of many planets. It came to a close around [[15,000 BBY/Legends|15,000 BBY]], when Yo'gand utilized a [[Yo'gand's Core|technique]] that was later named after him, to drop a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] on the planet [[Ygziir]], which was allied with Steng. The tactic destroyed the planet, and [[Death/Legends|killed]] many of the leaders of Steng's faction, who were stationed on Ygziir. Steng was also killed in the battle, bringing the war to an end.<ref name="negas" /><ref name="tuf" /><ref name="cswe" />

[[File:YuuzhanVong_NEGAS.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A [[Yuuzhan Vong]] warrior]]

==Aftermath==
Yo'gand became the Yuuzhan Vong's first [[Supreme Overlord]], and united the species. He was remembered as a hero for his actions, while the [[Battle of Ygziir]] was considered the proudest moment in Yuuzhan Vong history. However, the Cremlevian War left the Yuuzhan Vong's galaxy ruined. Many planets had been destroyed or greatly damaged in the struggle; the Yuuzhan Vong [[Sentience/Legends|living]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Yuuzhan'tar]] was one of the worlds that had suffered. The war had turned the Yuuzhan Vong to violence, and Yuuzhan'tar stripped the bloodthirsty species of their ability to touch [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. The Yuuzhan Vong began worshipping pain and espousing a philosophy of violence and death to all who opposed them. After thousands of years of ferocity and destruction, the galaxy had been stripped of its resources, and was in ruin. The Yuuzhan Vong departed their galaxy to wander the [[Intergalactic Void]]. Eventually, they discovered a [[The galaxy/Legends|new galaxy]], which they [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invaded]] in hope of conquering it.<ref name="tuf" /><ref name="cswe" /><ref name="nec">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Cremlevian War was first mentioned in ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'', the opening book of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series. It was later mentioned in ''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'', ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'', and several reference guides that revealed more information about the ancient war. It was also given an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.

As stated by [[Author/Legends|author]] [[Daniel Wallace]] on his blog, ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' implies that the [[Silentium]] and the [[Abominor]] were the droid species responsible for invading the Yuuzhan Vong, and threatening to [[Silentium–Abominor War|wipe them out]]. However, this has not been confirmed by an official source, and thus remains mere speculation.<ref name="endnotes">{{Blog|danwallace|52|Endnotes for The New Essential Guide to Droids: PART 1 OF 3}}</ref>
